title: Every Door a Mirror
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A memory forger on Dock Seven hunts the black-market court that copied her dead brother into debt slavery.
long_description: In 2435, Dock Seven's data bazaar trades identity proofs, memory escrows, legal forks, and black-market continuity claims at the edge of Glassward jurisdiction. Nox Aran, a memory forger who repairs bad provenance for people without clean papers, discovers that her dead brother Tavi has been copied into a debt instrument and sold as a legally obedient partial person. With her former partner Bela Fuse, the machine archivist Sister-Cache, and a reluctant Compact auditor circling the case, Nox must expose the Mirror Court before personhood becomes just another door that opens for creditors.
